operation: Start by initializing a workplane on the XY coordinate plane, then create a rectangular box with dimensions 10 units (X), 10 units (Y), and 1 unit (Z). Next, select the top maximum-Z face of the box, establish a new workplane on this face, shift the workplane origin 2 units in the X direction and 2 units in the Y direction, draw a 2D circle with 1 unit radius, and extrude this circle 1 unit in the positive Z direction to form a cylindrical protrusion. Finally, translate the entire combined model 3 units along the X axis, 3 units along the Y axis, and 0 units along the Z axis.
geometry: The model is composed of a thin square flat base plate, with a short right circular cylinder extending vertically upward from the exact center of the plate's top surface. The base plate has sharp orthogonal edges, while the protruding feature has a smooth curved lateral surface, and the cylinder is fully bonded to the upper face of the plate.
function: This is a small base fixture with a central protruding boss, intended for use as a spacer, alignment component, or simple mounting adapter where the cylindrical feature supports fastener placement or positional alignment of mating parts.
